title: G4GADGET 2 Pack Hanging Basket Pulley Hooks – Adjustable Plant Hanger Pulley for Hanging Basket, Bird Feeder – Heavy Duty Retractable Garden Pulley System, Max Load 20kg
features: ✅ Strong & Durable Build – Designed with a chrome top and stainless steel bottom, ensuring strength, corrosion resistance, and long-lasting performance indoors or outdoors.
✅ Heavy Duty Support – Each pulley holds 1–20kg safely, perfect for hanging baskets, planters, bird feeders, lanterns, or ornaments with reliable stability.
✅ Retractable & Adjustable – Smoothly extends up to 85cm and locks securely at various heights, allowing quick adjustment without ladders.
✅ Space-Saving Design – Ideal for balconies, porches, gardens, and eaves; keeps plants accessible for watering while maximizing vertical space.
✅ Easy & Practical Use – Simply hook, pull, and lock—making plant care, refilling bird feeders, or decorating effortless. A must-have garden hanging accessory.
description: SUpgrade your gardening setup with the G4GADGET Retractable Plant Pulley 2 Pack, the ultimate solution for hanging baskets, planters, and feeders with ease. Each pulley is built with a chrome top and stainless steel bottom, providing both strength and durability to withstand everyday use indoors or outdoors. With a max extension of 85cm and a load capacity of 1–20kg, these pulleys are perfect for hanging flower baskets, bird feeders, lanterns, or decorative ornaments without worry. The retractable design allows you to adjust the height effortlessly, so you can water plants, feed birds, or change decorations without using a ladder. Multiple lock points ensure your items stay securely in place. Whether you’re brightening your balcony with hanging plants, creating a stylish garden display, or keeping bird feeders easy to reach, this heavy-duty pulley set saves space and adds convenience. With G4GADGET quality, you can trust these pulleys to make gardening, decorating, and plant care simple and enjoyable—perfect for every home and garden enthusiast.
